title: demon blood
description: mod addon of kimetsu no yaiba mod, add blood demon arts
body:
This mod is an expansion for the mod "Kimetsu No Yaiba"

That's a mod based on the manga and anime of demon slayer.

This mod adds several blood demon arts for example that of nakime (missing in the mod kimetsu no yaiba)
and many other custom blood demon arts, this means people can have custom OCs with their own powers to go with it!
